response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 15-year experience minimum with a long, broad engineering career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus open-source leadership and recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling, agentic frameworks). However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position, and the resume shows no track record of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products or platforms at scale, cloud platform strategy, or advising strategic customers — the career trajectory is deep individual-contributor craftsmanship rather than strategic technical leadership, and there is no advanced AI-related degree.
strengths: 30+ years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Founder and long-term maintainer of an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or AI-powered products/platforms at meaningful scale
No evidence of director-level strategy, customer advisory, or organizational influence expected of a Principal Engineer
Career positioning is senior full-stack IC; limited cloud platform strategy or ML depth for an AI strategy role

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Depth and breadth of engineering experience (exceeds 15-year bar)
No strategic leadership or customer advisory experience
